# wake status

Show status of a schedule

## Flags

| Name | Short | Type | Default | Env | Description |
|------|-------|------|---------|-----|-------------|
| `--lines` |  | int | 20 |  | Number of journal entries to show |
| `--follow` |  | bool |  |  | Stream journal entries |
| `--json` |  | bool |  |  | Output status as JSON |

## Arguments

| Name | Required | Description |
|------|----------|-------------|
| `name` | yes | Schedule name |
